title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an AI-powered testing automation tool that runs in the background and generates, executes, and validates tests from plain English descriptions. It replaces manual QA processes and reportedly cuts testing costs by 50%.
writeup: This video from Jack Roberts demonstrates KaneAI, an AI-powered testing automation tool that generates, executes, and validates software tests from plain English descriptions while running in the background. The focus is replacing manual QA processes for SaaS products, with the claim that testing costs drop by 50%. The walkthrough touches on workflow automation, AI agents, and prompt engineering as the mechanisms behind turning natural language test descriptions into executable test runs.
